title: cyperus anisitsii
intro: Cyperus anisitsii, also known as Anisitsia or False Papyrus, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus anisitsii include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. Cyperus anisitsii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
